svg.title: Music recommendation algorithm flowchart
svg.desc: Flowchart from input data through preprocessing, scoring, weighted ranking, to top K recommendations output

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the input data for this recommendation system?')
sendPrompt('What song features are used in the recommendation algorithm?')
sendPrompt('What user preferences are captured in the user profile?')
sendPrompt('What preprocessing steps are done before scoring?')
sendPrompt('How are song features normalized to 0..1?')
sendPrompt('How are user targets normalized to 0..1?')
sendPrompt('How is each song scored against the user profile?')
sendPrompt('How is the categorical score for genre and mood computed?')
sendPrompt('How is the numeric closeness score per feature computed?')
sendPrompt('What does the formula s_f(i) = 1 - |x_i_f - p_f| mean?')
sendPrompt('How are category and feature scores combined into one score?')
sendPrompt('Walk me through the full weighted score formula S(i)')
g.text: + Σ(w_f · s_f(i)) for all numeric features

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How are songs ranked after scoring?')
sendPrompt('Why do we sort songs by S(i) in descending order?')
sendPrompt('How should already-consumed songs be filtered?')
sendPrompt('How do we choose K for the top K recommendations?')
sendPrompt('What should the explanation for each recommendation include?')
